# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

admin:
  access_log_path: /dev/stdout
  address:
    socket_address:
      protocol: TCP
      address: 127.0.0.1
      port_value: 9901

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: listener_http
    address:
      socket_address:
        protocol: TCP
        address: 0.0.0.0
        port_value: 80
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
          stat_prefix: ingress_http
          codec_type: AUTO
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: backend_api_gateway
              domains: ["*"] # Matches all hostnames
              routes:
              - match:
                  prefix: "/api/service1"
                route:
                  cluster: service1_cluster
                  timeout: 5s
              - match:
                  prefix: "/api/service2"
                route:
                  cluster: service2_cluster
                  timeout: 5s
              - match: # Default route for any other /api prefix not matched
                  prefix: "/api/"
                route:
                  cluster: default_api_cluster
                  timeout: 5s
              - match: # Catch-all route to redirect or return 404
                  prefix: "/"
                direct_response:
                  status: 404
                  body:
                    inline_string: "Not Found"
          http_filters:
          - name: envoy.filters.http.router
            typed_config:
              "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router

  clusters:
  - name: service1_cluster
    connect_timeout: 1s
    type: LOGICAL_DNS # Or STATIC, EDS, STRICT_DNS
    dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: service1_cluster
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: service1.local # Replace with actual service hostname or IP
                port_value: 8080
    health_checks:
    - timeout: 1s
      interval: 5s
      unhealthy_threshold: 3
      healthy_threshold: 1
      http_health_check:
        path: "/health" # Health check endpoint on service1
        host: "service1.local" # Host header for health check
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - priority: DEFAULT
        max_connections: 1024    # Max parallel connections to upstream hosts
        max_pending_requests: 1024 # Max pending requests to upstream hosts
        max_requests: 1024       # Max parallel requests to upstream hosts
        max_retries: 3           # Max retries to upstream hosts

  - name: service2_cluster
    connect_timeout: 1s
    type: LOGICAL_DNS
    dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: service2_cluster
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: service2.local # Replace with actual service hostname or IP
                port_value: 8081
    health_checks:
    - timeout: 1s
      interval: 5s
      unhealthy_threshold: 3
      healthy_threshold: 1
      http_health_check:
        path: "/status" # Health check endpoint on service2
        host: "service2.local" # Host header for health check
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - priority: DEFAULT
        max_connections: 1024
        max_pending_requests: 1024
        max_requests: 1024
        max_retries: 3

  - name: default_api_cluster
    connect_timeout: 1s
    type: LOGICAL_DNS
    dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: default_api_cluster
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: default-api.local # Fallback for unmatched /api paths
                port_value: 8080
    health_checks:
    - timeout: 1s
      interval: 5s
      unhealthy_threshold: 3
      healthy_threshold: 1
      http_health_check:
        path: "/healthz"
        host: "default-api.local"
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - priority: DEFAULT
        max_connections: 1024
        max_pending_requests: 1024
        max_requests: 1024
        max_retries: 3
